data.name: The Lewdest Sovereign
data.detailed_description:
扮演一位風流倜儻的中世紀君主，坐上王位，治理你的王國。與四大關鍵派系——貴族、軍隊、教會和民眾——建立關係。他們會請求你對王國發生的事件採取行動，以維護他們的利益。你可以透過做出對他們有利或有害的決定來提升他們對你的好感度。但要小心；你做的一些決定可能會帶來意想不到的後果，甚至可能引發一些風流韻事！

獲得性愛場景：

做出不同的選擇，努力提升你與四個派系中任何一個的關係至最高點，以解鎖不同的性愛場景結局。同時，也要找出如何做出選擇才能將這些關係降至最低點，從而解鎖其他性愛場景結局。努力收集所有結局吧！

體驗各種各樣的事件，與形形色色的人互動：

幫助村民抵禦洪水，阻止法師攻擊你的城堡，資助組建最強大的軍隊，與鄰國的女王發展親密關係，還有更多精彩事件等你來體驗，盡情享受管理王國的樂趣！你會遇到各種各樣的人物，例如狐女、女巫、修女、騎士、農民、貴族、你的宮廷小丑等等，他們會排隊向你提出請求。你需要決定是否要幫助他們，因為每個請求都有代價，但也會帶來相應的回報。

在遊戲中，你需要做出正確的選擇，才能與王國中遇到的任何角色發生性關係，並努力找到所有可以發生性關係的物件！選擇對王國最有利的選項！ ……或選擇對你的性慾最有利的選項。哪個對你比較重要，就選哪個。 在這款王國管理和收集類遊戲中，開啟你的統治之旅吧！

data.short_description: 在這個遊戲中，你需要做出各種選擇來統治王國，這些選擇會快速引出性愛場景。同時，你也要努力提升或降低王國各派系的信仰價值。做出不同的選擇，解鎖王國所有子民的性愛場面。
data.supported_languages:
英文*, 日文*, 韓文*, 俄文*, 繁體中文*, 簡體中文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: windows 10
  • 處理器: Intel Core i5-2300
  • 記憶體: 8 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GeForce GTX 460

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Catalina 10.15
  • 處理器: Intel Core i5-2300
  • 記憶體: 8 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Radeon Pro 555X

data.name: The Lewdest Sovereign
data.detailed_description:
Sit on the throne as a horny medieval monarch and manage your kingdom. Develop relations with the four key factions: nobility, army, church, and commoners. They will request you take action in events happening around the kingdom in a way that benefits them. You can choose to raise their favor towards you by making a decision in the kingdom that helps or harms them. But beware; some of these decisions you make might lead to sex!

Get sex scenes:

Make decisions to try to raise your relationship with any of the four factions to the max to get a sex scene ending. Figure out what choices you can make to also lower those relationships to the bottom to get a different sex scene ending. Try to collect them all!

Play through lots of events with lots of types of people:

Help the peasants from a flooding river, stop mages from attacking your castle, fund the most powerful army in the lands, get intimate with a queen from a neighboring land and have fun dealing with many more events involved in managing your kingdom! Deal with a large variety of subjects such as foxgirls, witches, nuns, knights, peasants, nobles, your jester and more as they line up to make requests of you and decide whether you want to help them or not as each request comes at a cost but also yields their own benefits.

Figure out which decision you need to choose during events to get a sex scene with any people from the kingdom that you meet and try to find them all! Pick the option that is best for the kingdom! ...or your libido. Whichever is more important to you. Start your reign in this kingdom management, collectathon game!

data.short_description: Rule the kingdom by making choices that quickly lead to sex scenes as you try to max or deplete all faith with your kingdom's factions. Make choices to hunt for sex scenes for all your kingdom's people.
data.supported_languages:
English*, Japanese*, Korean*, Russian*, Traditional Chinese*, Simplified Chinese*
*languages with full audio support

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS: windows 10
  • Processor: Intel Core i5-2300
  • Memory: 8 MB RAM
  • Graphics: GeForce GTX 460

mac_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS: Catalina 10.15
  • Processor: Intel Core i5-2300
  • Memory: 8 MB RAM
  • Graphics: Radeon Pro 555X
